description.dashboard: Live operational health, queues and governance signals.
description.marketplace: Publish opportunities and manage the commercial talent lifecycle.
description.workspace: Deliver projects, tasks, milestones and evidence in one governed room.
description.collaboration: Tenant-isolated channels, threads, mentions, presence and realtime events.
description.notifications: Prioritised in-app and provider-backed notification delivery.
description.files: Versioned, signed, scanned and policy-governed enterprise content.
description.ai: Policy-controlled AI runs with human approvals and provider transparency.
description.contracts: Contracts, amendments, milestones and dispute workflows.
description.finance: AED billing, subscriptions, invoices, escrow and settlement foundations.
description.orchestration: Versioned work graphs, durable runs and human decision gates.
description.analytics: Tenant-scoped operational, commercial and AI performance insights.
description.search: Search work, marketplace, files and knowledge across the organization.
description.admin: Moderation, compliance, support and platform control surfaces.
